MAXWARN_LIMIT_DESC: Number of warnings before action is taken
MAXWARN_ACTION_DESC: Which action should be executed when maximum warnings are reached?
DEFAULT_REASON_DESC: This reason will be automatically used for kicks/bans when no specific reason is provided.
SECTION_MODLOG_EVENTS_DESC: Choose which actions should be logged in the modlog channel
SECTION_DM_NOTIFICATIONS_DESC: Should the affected user be notified via direct message?

HELP.TITLE: Help & Tips
HELP.MODERATION_TEXT: Manage warnings, kicks, bans and timeouts for your server.
HELP.MODLOG_TEXT: Log all moderation actions in a dedicated channel.
HELP.DM_TEXT: Automatically inform affected users about moderation actions via direct message.
